events.notes: Initial retroactive mining airdrop allocation (7.5% of supply) made claimable at launch; actual claim pace spread over 18 months.
Liquidity provider rewards pool (2.5% of supply) began emitting at launch over 5 years via epoch-based distribution.
Safety module staking rewards (2.5% of supply) began emitting at launch over 5 years.
Trading rewards allocation (38.36% of supply) began emitting at launch over 5 years in 28-day epochs; not a single unlock event but continuous emission.
18-month cliff expiry for investor allocations (27.73% total to investors); tokens begin linear vesting monthly after this date through Aug 2026.
18-month cliff expiry for employees & consultants (15.27% of supply); linear monthly vesting begins after cliff through Aug 2026.
dYdX Foundation treasury (11.67% total) begins unlocking after 18-month cliff; remainder vests linearly over following 36 months.
Future employees & consultants reserve (0.625% tranche) cliff unlock begins Feb 2023 with linear vesting thereafter.
Final investor vesting tranche fully unlocked; all investor tokens fully distributed by this date (5 years post-launch).
All employee/consultant tokens fully vested by Aug 2026 (5-year schedule complete); this marks end of structured vesting.

summary: DYDX launched in August 2021 with ~8% circulating supply; the dominant unlock pressure came on February 3, 2023 (18 months post-launch) when the cliff expired for investors (~27.73% of supply) and the team/employees (~15.27% of supply), releasing those cohorts into monthly linear vesting through August 2026. Continuous emissions for trading rewards (~38.36%), liquidity provider rewards (2.5%), and staking rewards (2.5%) have been dripping out since launch in 28-day epochs, creating steady but moderate sell pressure. By August 2026 the full 1 billion token supply will be fully distributed, with the heaviest discrete unlock pressure having already passed in early-to-mid 2023.
caveats: 1) Exact per-epoch emission amounts for trading/LP/staking rewards require on-chain calculation or a paid data provider — epoch-by-epoch breakdowns are NOT_AVAILABLE_FREE_TIER on tokenunlocks.app without a subscription. 2) The dYdX v4 chain migration (Oct 2023) introduced wethDYDX and new staking/validator reward mechanics; precise new-chain emission schedules require reading the dYdX Chain docs and may differ from v3 figures cited here. 3) Investor sub-allocation breakdown (a16z, Paradigm, etc.) and exact per-investor cliff/vest dates are not publicly disclosed at granular level. 4) Some figures (e.g. exact Feb 2023 cliff unlock token counts) are derived from published percentage allocations × 1B supply and may differ slightly from on-chain actuals due to rounding or governance changes. Source URLs for tokenunlocks.app free tier: https://tokenunlocks.app/dydx — detailed schedule requires login.
